site.name: LIFENICE
site.title: LIFENICE Football Club
site.description: A football club built to inspire, connect, and introduce our team globally.

footer.description: Official platform for club news, matches, players, membership, partners, and fan experiences.

home.heroSubtitle: More Than a Team. A Cold-Blooded Legacy.
home.heroDescription: Built for players who bring discipline, creativity, and hunger to every match. A club identity shaped by calm mentality, fast movement, and beautiful football.
home.aboutTitle: Built on passion. Driven by victory.
home.aboutDescription: Life N Ice FC represents sharp mentality, disciplined football, and fearless team spirit. The club plays with cold focus, quick transitions, and a strong identity that feels premium from the first touch.
home.aboutValue1Description: The team stays calm under pressure and makes every moment count.
home.aboutValue2Description: Fast movement, direct football, and dangerous decisions in the final third.
home.aboutValue3Description: Every player fights for the badge, the team, and the final whistle.
home.identityTitle: A team with a clear football soul.
home.identityDescription: The home page should make users feel the club before they read too much. This section gives the team a strong personality.
home.identityItem1Description: Every match starts with structure, responsibility, and respect for the game.
home.identityItem2Description: The team plays with imagination, technical control, and brave attacking ideas.
home.identityItem3Description: Pressure does not break the team. It sharpens the identity.
home.momentsCardDescription: Use this space for a premium banner-style image later: team lineup, stadium, training, celebration, or a dramatic football scene.
home.momentsItem1Description: A powerful visual moment that shows the squad ready for battle.
home.momentsItem2Description: Celebrations, passion, and the feeling of winning together.
home.momentsItem3Description: A section that turns the team from a name into a real identity.
home.galleryDescription: Later, replace these cards with real team images, banners, or generated football artwork.
home.galleryItem3Description: The badge means more when everyone fights together.
home.galleryItem4Description: The final whistle, the celebration, the memory.

error.title: Unexpected error
error.description: The page could not be loaded correctly. Please try again or return to the homepage.

notFound.title: This page is offside
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist, has moved, or is no longer available.
